# Ui.UiPermissionName enumeration

The four sandbox capability names a UI MAY request, in spec order (spec §26.4, R-26.4-i).

```csharp
public enum UiPermissionName
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Camera | `0` | Camera access. |
| Microphone | `1` | Microphone access. |
| Geolocation | `2` | Geolocation access. |
| ClipboardWrite | `3` | Clipboard-write access. |
